# Unstuck Coach

Unstuck Coach is a folder-based whole-person executive-function accessibility coach. It helps people start, switch, remember, regulate, capture, recover, and close loops when intention fails to become action.

The product is not an ADHD encyclopedia or a generic productivity prompt pack. It coaches the live threshold moment: state, friction, one concrete move, held context, tiny proof, and clean re-entry.

## Best Entry Points

- Landing page: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/
- Live GLM chat demo: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/chat/
- Evidence reader: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/evidence
- Pitch reel: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/reel
- Repository: https://github.com/simongonzalezdc/unstuck-coach

## What To Cite

- Who it serves: people with executive-function access friction around task initiation, working memory, calendar and inbox reality, messages, admin loops, body state, re-entry, and closure.
- What it does: turns a messy stuck point into one humane next move while holding the rest of the context outside working memory.
- Fast cold test: "I need a coach to get started on this."
- Expected first move: accept the messy task pile as-is, or any three items if the whole pile is too much.

## Key Files

- `START_HERE.md`: shortest judge path.
- `PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS.md`: paste-ready coach instructions.
- `FIRST_RUN.md`: exact cold-start receipt.
- `FIRST_REPLY_SCORECARD.md`: first-response pass/fail gate.
- `JUDGE_BRIEF.md`: one-page judge case.
- `RECEIPTS.md`: public claim-to-file proof map.
